---
name: Feature
about: Track a scoped MVP feature
title: "[Feature] "
labels: ["feature"]
assignees: []
---

## Goal
What should be true after this issue is done?

## Background
Why is this needed for PersonaFlow?

## Scope
What is included in this issue?

## Out of scope
What must not be changed or added?

## Implementation notes
List any constraints, expected files, API contracts, UI expectations, or data model assumptions.

## Definition of done
Concrete checks that must pass before this issue is complete.

## Deliverables
What files, endpoints, screens, tests, or docs should exist after completion?

## Notes for Codex
- Read `README.md` and `AGENTS.md` first.
- Keep changes minimal and localized.
- Do not expand scope beyond this issue.
- Do not introduce unnecessary abstractions.
- Do not turn PersonaFlow into a real-time translation app.
